message:
docs: Update verification notes with 2026-01-27 additions

- Added pixel rendering, UTF-8 search functions, draw wrappers
- Updated feature count to 78 total features
- Updated test count to 451+ tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@

+**Test Status:** cargo test passing (451+ tests including unit, conformance, e2e, and doc tests) on 2026-01-27
